## Description

<!-- Briefly describe what this change does and why. Link to any related issues. -->

Closes #

## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `feat` — New VM configuration or feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix or corrected misconfiguration
- [ ] `ci` — Workflow / pipeline change
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `refactor` — Restructuring without functional change
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance (dependency bumps, tooling)
- [ ] `security` — Security-related change

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes locally
- [ ] `terraform fmt` has been run on changed `.tfvars` files
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or sensitive values are committed
- [ ] `terraforms.tfvars.nocommit` is **not** included in this PR
- [ ] README updated if configuration options changed
